text: I'm mostly fine, just wanted to rule anything out.
label: migraine/discharge

text: Just wanted to check in — I've felt slightly off for a few days.
label: non-infectious

text: I feel like I'm suffocating. Severe shortness of breath, chest agony, high fever. 9 day(s) like this, though I think I'm slowly getting better.
label: pneumonia/severe

text: I started with a cold but the cough has lingered — a bit of chest tightness too. 4 day(s). Breathing is very laboured.
label: pneumonia/mild

text: Worsening chest cough with thick mucus, feverish, and quite short of breath. 4 day(s).
label: pneumonia/mild

text: Woke up feeling rough: chills, headache, that fluey feeling. About 6 day(s) in. I have a very high fever.
label: pneumonia/moderate

text: My chest really hurts when I cough or take a deep breath. Quite a bit of phlegm, fever, feeling weak. 9 day(s). I'm burning up.
label: pneumonia/severe

text: Felt a bit run-down this week, might be stress.
label: non-infectious

text: Worsening chest cough with thick mucus, feverish, and quite short of breath. 13 day(s).

text: Coughing a lot, bringing up darker mucus, feverish, noticeably short of breath. 9 day(s).
label: pneumonia/severe

text: Slight fever, some body aches, scratchy throat. Probably flu starting, 1 day(s), not getting better, not getting worse.
label: pneumonia/mild

text: I can barely move — high fever, shaking chills, splitting headache, bad cough. 10 day(s) like this, and it feels like it might be turning a corner. I'm burning up.
label: pneumonia/severe

text: Slight fever, some body aches, scratchy throat. Probably flu starting, 5 day(s), though I notice it's not improving. I can't catch my breath.
label: pneumonia/mild

text: Fever on and off, drenched in sweat, can't get out of bed. This has gone on 10 day(s), though it seems to be slowly resolving. I'm burning up.

text: I have a bad productive cough — bringing up yellowish phlegm — and it hurts to breathe deeply. 6 day(s) like this, though I notice it's not improving. My temperature is really elevated.
label: pneumonia/severe
